_NOTE: Email bridge via IMAP (inbound) + SMTP (outbound). Use an app-specific password for Gmail / iCloud / Outlook etc. Whitelist contains sender email addresses (lowercase). Setup walkthrough: README -> Email bridge.
_NOTE_chat_profiles: Default is MAXIMUM OPEN (--dangerously-skip-permissions, all tools). To RESTRICT bot behaviour for individual senders, add a 'chat_profiles' object keyed by the sender email. Hot-reload applies immediately.
_NOTE_stream_idle_timeout_seconds: OPTIONAL (default 300 s = 5 min). Increase for long-running tasks (Deep Research, complex Workflows). Example: 3600 s = 1 hour. Prevents 'Stream-Idle-Watchdog' timeouts on slow operations.
